items.front: How is arrival and departure sequencing established?
items.back: By requiring aircraft to adjust flight or ground operation as needed to achieve proper spacing.

items.front: How is an aircraft treated after a touch-and-go, stop-and-go, or low approach clearance?
items.back: Treat it as arriving until touchdown, complete stop, or threshold crossing, then treat it as departing.

items.front: When are simultaneous same-direction operations on parallel runways allowed?
items.back: Only in VFR unless visual separation is applied, with two-way radio communication, pertinent traffic information, and the required parallel-runway distance minima.

items.front: When are simultaneous opposite-direction operations on parallel runways allowed?
items.back: Only in VFR, with two-way radio communication, pertinent traffic information, and the required parallel-runway distance minima.
